ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: argoproj/argo-cd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd
Language: go
Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use Media-over-QUIC / SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP live media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback real-time video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coder/coder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coder/coder
Language: go
Secure environments for developers and their agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crowdsecurity/crowdsec
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crowdsecurity/crowdsec
Language: go
CrowdSec - the open-source and participative security solution offering crowdsourced protection against malicious IPs and access to the most advanced real-world CTI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: enfein/mieru
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/enfein/mieru
Language: go
mieru is a socks5 / HTTP / HTTPS proxy to bypass censorship. 見える是一款 socks5 / HTTP / HTTPS 网络代理翻墙工具。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flyteorg/flyte
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flyteorg/flyte
Language: go
Dynamic, resilient AI orchestration. Coordinate data, models, and compute as you build AI workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/mcp-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox
Language: go
MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gruntwork-io/terragrunt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt
Language: go
Terragrunt is a flexible orchestration tool that allows Infrastructure as Code written in OpenTofu/Terraform to scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
Language: go
A tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 An orchestration engine for background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juicedata/juicefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juicedata/juicefs
Language: go
JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k3s-io/k3s
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s
Language: go
Lightweight Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kenn-io/agentsview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kenn-io/agentsview
Language: go
Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: larksuite/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/larksuite/cli
Language: go
The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: milvus-io/milvus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus
Language: go
Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/node_exporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter
Language: go
Exporter for machine metrics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: restic/restic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/restic/restic
Language: go
Fast, secure, efficient backup program

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: traefik/traefik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traefik/traefik
Language: go
The Cloud Native Application Proxy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/semantic-router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router
Language: go
System Level Intelligent Router for Mixture-of-Models at Cloud, Data Center and Edge
